untranslatable_reason: The signal requires identification of 'major support/resistance levels', 'all-time highs', and 'seasonal highs/lows' — concepts that require external reference data or multi-timeframe/multi-year analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) approximate recent extremes but cannot capture all-time highs or seasonal patterns. Detecting 'multiple tests' of a level requires pattern recognition beyond simple numeric comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted to use Donchian channels as a proxy for dynamic support/resistance testing, but the core signal requirement of identifying all-time highs and seasonal extremes cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators alone. A complete implementation would require external data feeds or custom preprocessing.
